mentions.note: Claude AI leader with enterprise focus (80% B2B revenue); $350B valuation (up from $183B Sept); expects profitability 2028 vs. OpenAI 2030; smartest tech people bullish; trading 30-40x sales; if IPO'd H1-H2 2026, likely winner.
Claude Code emerging as enterprise software favorite; practical B2B AI solution; potential mega-IPO candidate at $350B valuation later in 2026.

Private company; Cramer mentioned he has seen rival AI products created at fraction of cost using Anthropic's platform; not enough conviction to recommend but technology competitive threat to enterprise software vendors.
Revolutionary AI platform helping banks/legal professionals; writing code, measuring systems; crushing Thompson Reuters' similar (but inferior, pricier) product.
Destroyer of enterprise software thesis; disruptive press releases forcing vendors to shorten contracts and accept smaller margins; existential threat to software stickiness model.
AI safety platform overhyped as competing with Crowdstrike; doesn't actually compete but market overreacted.
Pre-IPO company; $19–20B ARR, doubled since end of last year. Taking enterprise software share from traditional players; disrupting software company clients.

Pre-IPO AI company adopting Nvidia architecture; demand for compute capacity 'like crazy.' Jensen Huang highlighted Anthropic as major customer and partner; confidential computing on Nvidia allows Anthropic to run models across clouds with proprietary protection.
Mentioned as 'king of enterprise AI'; 20%+ of Fundrise Innovation Fund; competing with OpenAI on Frontier-class models; private but on IPO path.

Private company launching agentic AI Claude model; market incorrectly believes this eliminates traditional cybersecurity need. Reality: AI agents programmed by hackers require stronger, not weaker, security.
Private; $380B valuation; upcoming IPO; capital drain risk alongside SpaceX and OpenAI.

Frontier AI lab; developed Mythos model & Project Chimera partnership with tech/cybersecurity firms. Cramer emphasizes Anthropic needs CrowdStrike & partners; not competitive threat to specialized security vendors.
Private/pre-IPO AI company; mentioned alongside OpenAI as elite AI play poised for upside; Aru research hints at competitive dynamics with legacy SaaS.
Pre-IPO private company; leading in generative AI with Claude surpassing ChatGPT in user intent; best client for Nvidia; disruption threat to legacy software overblown.
Pre-IPO AI models layer; announced major capex deal with AWS. Frontier AI model developer; huge growth opportunity.
Currently valued ~$400B, likely to IPO at $1T+. Enterprise-focused AI; sticky customer base. Part of capital-draining IPO trio.
Valuation $40B → $380B → $900B (Feb 2026). Raising $30B in latest round; reportedly seeking another at $900B. IPO timing TBD. Risk: enormous supply overhang.

Private pre-IPO AI company expected to be wildly profitable this quarter; disrupting enterprise software by proving AI can replace expensive software with cheaper alternatives; #1 on CNBC Disruptor 50.
Just filed to go public today; listed as key Nvidia client with $14B Amazon investment; Amazon's chips crucial to Anthropic infrastructure.
B2B AI company with multiple revenue streams looks excellent in isolation, but IPO timing sandwiched between SpaceX and OpenAI creates concerns about capital availability and multiple compression.
Real enterprise revenue growing like weed—more credible than OpenAI. But IPO timing uncertain and private valuations concerning. Wait for public market price discovery.

Claude AI platform shows exceptional user intent: 46% of current users plan more usage vs only 6% less (next-best brand 17%, average brand 1%). The deal to own for pricing power and user sentiment dominance.
Expected to file for IPO soon in wake of SpaceX success; investors eager to ring register; monitor for allocation availability.
Doing incredibly well; fantastic growth company with great product (Claude). Put in for as much stock as you can when IPO happens. Next two AI IPOs are OpenAI and Anthropic.
Pre-IPO/private AI company; doing incredibly well with Claude product; fantastic growth company; Cramer wants club members to put in for as much stock as possible.
Private AI company that adopted Nvidia's architecture; expanding compute across AWS, Microsoft Azure, and other clouds with demand described as 'crazy high.'
